elevenlabs_keys.description: Comma-separated ElevenLabs keys supplied from the deployment environment.

cloudinary_cloud_name.description: Cloudinary cloud name used for image / video uploads.

cloudinary_upload_preset.description: Unsigned upload preset name used by the Android app.

algolia_app_id.description: Algolia application ID for full-text search.

feature_google_signin_enabled.description: Toggle to show / hide the Google sign-in button at runtime.

min_supported_app_version.description: Force-update threshold (versionCode). App will prompt update if below.
